metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_3957
metadata.comment: Rationale: Quantitative immuno-gold EM in macaque monkey enthorynal cortex show that EAAC1 is present predominantly at the edge of the PSD (peri-PSD) in the spine plasma membrane. These data are replicated in rodent hippocampus tissue (see supporting refs). No significant immuno-reactivity is observed in the presynaptic terminal. As EAAC1 is a transporter with several transmembrane regions (see UniProt F7H624 (F7H624_MACMU)), the localisation is integral to the spine membrane.. Experimental description: Macaque monkey (Macaca fascicularis): from text (no specific M&M here) "Four adult male long-tailed macaque monkeys (Macaca fascicularis) were used in this study. "

checks.label: OWL Consistency
